name: Pineapple Baked Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, brown the ground beef and drain any excess fat.
2. Transfer the browned beef to a 5-quart slow cooker.
3. Add the remaining ingredients (baked beans, pineapple tidbits, mushrooms, onion, green pepper, barbecue sauce, soy sauce, garlic, salt, and pepper) to the slow cooker and mix well.
4. Cover the slow cooker and cook on low for 4-8 hours or until bubbling.
5. Serve in bowls. This recipe yields 6-8 main dish servings or 12-16 side-dish servings.
